full_description: Inspect three gray blocks' hidden backside colors and place each on its matching red, green, or blue pad; at most two blocks share a color.
schema: {A} denotes the three gray backside-marked blocks, {B} denotes the three colored pads, {C} denotes the inspected backside colors, {a} denotes the arm used
preference: Mention the hard three-block matching by hidden backside color.
seen: Use {a} to inspect {A} and place every block on its matching pad.
Check all hidden back colors and match the three gray blocks to {B}.
Reveal each backside color, then sort the three blocks to the correct pads.
Match the three blocks by their hidden backside colors.
unseen: Inspect three block backs and match each to a color pad.
Sort all gray blocks by hidden backside color.
Use backside color information to place the three blocks.

seen: place that block on the matching pad
unseen: match the block to its color pad
